---
description: Ultra-short handoff prompt for implementation tasks in this repo.
---

Task
- {{task}}

Constraints
- Keep current workflow shape (notebook build path + Flask runtime path).
- No architecture/UI/ranking redesign unless explicitly requested.
- Smallest possible scoped edits.

Touch
- Allowed files/folders: {{allowed_scope}}
- Forbidden files/folders: {{forbidden_scope}}

Return
- Files changed
- What was verified
- Any follow-up item for 00_admin/backlog.md
